index.html: We honor the great builders of Infrastructure
Project owner apply for a partnership. We check the alignment with our philosophy. Analyze the feasibility and create our strategy. Get in touch with you and finalize the details.
Preparation for project launch. Signing agreements with partners. Listing project. Finalizing fundraising.
Completion of the round. Periodical follow up on the project.
Discover project of interest. Request more informations. First meeting, signing NNN. Access to VDR.
Contribution to the Round: Traditional way (approximately. 6 months upwards till finalization) or Tokenization way (immediately on-chain, RWA).
Keeping in loop with project updates and future plans.
On-chain tokenization of real-world infrastructure projects, enabling fractional investment and transparent ownership.
Agentic-AI systems for analyzing, evaluating, scoring, and reporting on global infrastructure projects.
privacy.html: This Privacy Policy applies to Hainan Infrastructure Partners Limited (incorporated in Hong Kong, Business Registration No. [XXXXXXXX]), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Hainan Infrastructure Platform Ltd., operator of this website.

This is a display-only informational website. We do not require users to register, log in, or submit personal data to access our content. We do not use cookies, tracking pixels, or analytics tools that collect personal data.
If you contact us voluntarily by email or other means, we may collect your name, email address, company name, job title, and the content of your message.
We use such personal data only to: respond to enquiries; maintain business correspondence records; and carry out internal compliance and administrative functions.
We do not use your personal data for direct marketing without your prior consent. We do not sell or rent your personal data.

We retain personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by law. We take reasonable technical and organisational steps to protect personal data from unauthorised access, loss, misuse, or disclosure.
We may disclose personal data to our professional advisers, our parent company, or where required by law or regulation.
This website does not use cookies.
regulatory.html: Hainan Infrastructure Partners Limited (incorporated in Hong Kong, Business Registration No. [XXXXXXXX]), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Hainan Infrastructure Platform Ltd., operates this website for informational purposes only.

Hainan Infrastructure Partners Limited is not authorised, licensed, or regulated by the Securities and Futures Commission of Hong Kong (SFC), the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA), or any other financial regulatory authority in Hong Kong or elsewhere in connection with the operation of this website or its described activities.

Hainan Infrastructure Partners Limited does not conduct any regulated activity under the Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571) or the Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing Ordinance (Cap. 615) of Hong Kong. It is not a virtual asset service provider (VASP) or virtual asset trading platform (VATP) operator.

This website provides information only. All real-world asset (RWA) tokenization infrastructure, transaction processing, custody, issuance, and related financial services are provided exclusively by Hainan Infrastructure Platform Ltd..

This website is intended for Professional Investors as defined under Schedule 1 of the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Ordinance (Cap. 571). No tokenized product or service may be offered, solicited, arranged, or transacted through this website.
Hainan Infrastructure Partners Limited does not hold, receive, transmit, or safeguard any virtual assets, client funds, or financial instruments.
